name: Black Sun Symbol
description: The Black Sun (German: Schwarze Sonne) is a symbol of esoteric and occult significance, often linked to Nazi mysticism and neo-Nazi ideologies. It takes the form of a sun wheel or Sonnenrad, typically featuring twelve radiating sig runes. Proponents claim it represents a powerful ancient energy source, a gateway to hidden knowledge, or a symbol of Aryan heritage and spiritual power. It is often associated with the Wewelsburg castle, a site Heinrich Himmler intended to be a spiritual center for the SS. The symbol's origins are debated, with some tracing it back to pre-Christian Germanic symbolism, while others argue it was a modern invention of Nazi occultists. Mainstream scholarship views the Black Sun as a relatively recent construct, primarily popularized by Nazi-era imagery and later adopted by neo-Nazi groups. Its association with the SS and its use in far-right circles have made it a controversial and often offensive symbol. There's no credible evidence to support claims of ancient origins or inherent occult power. The symbol's appeal lies in its perceived connection to a romanticized and often distorted vision of Germanic history and esoteric traditions. Its present usage is overwhelmingly tied to extremist ideologies.
subtitle: Nazi-era symbol with occult interpretations

claims.claim: The Black Sun is an ancient symbol with pre-Christian Germanic origins.
claims.evidence: Some proponents point to similar wheel-shaped symbols found in Germanic art and artifacts.
claims.criticism: Mainstream historians argue that the specific design of the Black Sun is a modern invention, and any similarities to older symbols are superficial and coincidental.

claims.claim: The Black Sun represents a powerful energy source or spiritual force.
claims.evidence: Some occultists believe it embodies a hidden energy source linked to the earth or the cosmos.
claims.criticism: There is no scientific evidence to support claims of a special energy source associated with the Black Sun. Such claims are considered pseudoscience.

claims.claim: The Black Sun is a symbol of Aryan heritage and racial purity.
claims.evidence: This claim is based on Nazi ideology, which sought to create a myth of Aryan racial superiority.
claims.criticism: The concept of an 'Aryan race' is a pseudoscientific construct used to justify racism and discrimination. There is no biological or historical basis for this claim.

keyFigures.name: Heinrich Himmler
keyFigures.role: SS leader who promoted the Wewelsburg as a spiritual center

keyFigures.name: Karl Maria Wiligut
keyFigures.role: Occultist associated with Himmler and the Wewelsburg

keyFigures.name: Nicholas Goodrick-Clarke
keyFigures.role: Scholar who documented the Black Sun's association with Nazi occultism

timeline.event: The Black Sun symbol is incorporated into the design of the Wewelsburg castle under Himmler's direction.
The symbol is adopted by neo-Nazi and far-right groups.

sources.author: Nicholas Goodrick-Clarke
sources.work: The Occult Roots of Nazism: Secret Aryan Cults and Their Influence on Nazi Ideology
sources.title: Nicholas Goodrick-Clarke
